books.description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones.

books.title: Rich Dad Poor Dad

books.title: Mrityunjay
books.author: Shivaji Sawant
books.description: Mrityunjay (Triumph Over Death) is a critically acclaimed, award-winning Marathi novel by Shivaji Sawant, centered on the life of Karna from the Mahabharata. Written as an autobiography, it explores Karna's struggles with identity, societal injustice, friendship, and virtue through multiple perspectives, including Karna, Kunti, Duryodhana, and Krishna.
